protein_name: Nucleoside transporter/FeoB GTPase Gate domain-containing protein
notes: First-pass curation is complete for all 14 carbohydrate/nucleoside transport-bucket genes. The new boundary module separates GntP-family gluconate transporters, CodB/cytosine and NCS1 nucleobase permeases, PnuC nicotinamide-riboside transport, PP_1740 beta-glucanase side context, PP_3142 membrane sugar-transferase side context, PP_3048 prophage structural context, and unresolved PP_0138 SpmB/Gate-domain membrane context.
